motive: Financial gain from the treasure map
evidence: Antler trophy on the mantel wiped clean of fingerprints
Scuff mark on the hardwood floor near the fireplace
Marcus's phone on the coffee table with a last text to an unknown number: 'I told you, it's mine now. Deal with it.'
Half-finished glass of whiskey with only Marcus's fingerprints
Notepad with Marcus's handwriting: 'Larry – grandfather's map – told him NO'
Damp hiking boots with fresh mud belonging to Larry
Boot prints in the mud outside
Small smear on the hallway carpet near Larry's room
Freshly used hand towel with faint brown stains in shared bathroom
Journal entry mentioning Larry asking questions about a map leading to $200K in coins
